title: Two-Tailed Rat
move_pattern: Randomly selects from Scratch, Disease Bite, Screech, or Call for Backup each turn. No move can repeat back-to-back. Screech can be used at most 3 times total per rat. Call for Backup can only be used once per rat instance. When summon conditions are not met, Call for Backup is never chosen; when they are met, it is chosen with ~75% weight.
notes: Call for Backup is gated by multiple conditions: (1) TurnsUntilSummonable starts at 2 and decrements with each non-summon move — the rat cannot summon for its first 2 turns; (2) the total summon count (CallForBackupCount) is shared and synced across all Two-Tailed Rats in the encounter, capped at 3; (3) there must be an empty enemy slot available; (4) no other rat in the encounter may already be planning Call for Backup. Summoned rats start with the same restrictions and count toward the shared limit of 3 summons.
